title: Kidambi Srikanth Finishes Runner-Up at US Open
indian_angle: Indian star Kidambi Srikanth reached a Super 300 final, showcasing his continued form on the international circuit.
summary: Kidambi Srikanth's impressive run at the US Open concluded with a loss in the final, marking a strong performance for the Indian shuttler.

title: Rounak Chouhan Stuns World No. 6 Chou Tien Chen at US Open
indian_angle: Young Indian shuttler Rounak Chouhan delivered a significant upset by defeating a top-ranked player, highlighting emerging talent.
summary: Rounak Chouhan, a self-proclaimed Cristiano Ronaldo fan, caused a stir at the US Open by beating World No. 6 Chou Tien Chen.

title: BAI Implements 3x15 Scoring System for Junior Domestic Tournaments
indian_angle: This new scoring system aims to develop younger Indian players (U-13, U-15, U-17) by introducing a different match dynamic in domestic events.
summary: Badminton Association of India has announced the implementation of a 3x15 scoring system for U-13, U-15, and U-17 domestic ranking tournaments and National Championships.

title: Asian Games Squad Features Thomas Cup Core, Treesa-Gayatri Return
indian_angle: India's strong Thomas Cup contingent forms the core of the Asian Games squad, with the return of Treesa Jolly and Gayatri Gopichand boosting medal hopes.
summary: The Thomas Cup winning squad members are reassembling for the Asian Games, with Treesa Jolly and Gayatri Gopichand making their return to the team.

title: India Invites Expressions of Interest to Host World Championships 2026
indian_angle: India is preparing to host the prestigious BWF World Championships in 2026, a significant milestone for Indian badminton.
summary: The Badminton Association of India has issued an Expression of Interest for the upcoming BWF World Championships 2026, indicating India's readiness to host the global event.
